06/16/2025 E See remarks for effective date
Council Document:
89R 8154 LHC/KJE-D
Caption Version:
Enrolled
Caption Text:
Relating to an increase in the amount of the exemption of residence homesteads from ad valorem taxation by a school district and the protection of school districts against certain losses in local revenue.
Author:
Bettencourt | Alvarado | Birdwell | Blanco | Campbell | Cook | Creighton | Eckhardt | Flores | Gutierrez | Hagenbuch | Hall | Hancock | Hinojosa, Adam | Hinojosa, Juan "Chuy" | Huffman | Hughes | King | Kolkhorst | Menéndez | Middleton | Nichols | Parker | Paxton | Perry | Schwertner | Sparks | West | Zaffirini

Companion:
HB 2611 by Raymond, Identical
Enabling Information:
Enabling legislation for SJR 2.
Remarks:
This Act takes effect immediately, except Article 1 takes effect on the date of official canvass showing adoption of SJR 2, but only if SJR 2 is approved by the voters.
